name: conversation-list-section
title: ConversationListSection
description: Semantically labelled section for grouping conversation rows by meaningful chronology or category.

intent.summary: Semantically labelled section for grouping conversation rows by meaningful chronology or category.
useWhen: A conversation list needs visible groups such as Today, Yesterday, or Older.
avoidWhen: A flat list is clearer or the proposed grouping has no meaning to readers.
accessibility: The visible heading labels the section and must describe the relationship shared by its rows.
responsiveBehavior: Rows remain full width while the heading stays visible in document order.

sectionId.description: Optional stable id used for the section heading.
Optional stable id used for the section heading.

peerDependencies.frameworks: Custom Elements; React 18/19 wrappers; Angular 19-22 standalone adapters.
